name: paper-template
description: Minimal Japanese LaTeX paper template using upLaTeX, dvipdfmx, and latexmk.

scripts.check: npm run check:punctuation && npm run check:todo && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run init:paper && npm run format && latexmk -norc -r latexmkrc paper/main.tex
scripts.watch: npm run init:paper && npm run format && latexmk -norc -r latexmkrc -pvc paper/main.tex
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
